sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 50

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 50:1
items.html: (to the question) In the second three months, when the embryo comes to the middle dwelling, the correction of the sparks begins. Here too the three times apply, similar to the first three months in the lower dwelling: in the three days of absorption it receives the Nefesh of Nefesh of the discernment of the sparks; at the forty days of forming it receives the Ruach of Nefesh; and at the completion of the middle three months it receives Neshama, Haya, Yechida of Nefesh, of the discernment of the sparks. (There)
